subject: Bell 407 update
body:
Jeffrey,
I have Nicolas taking the Bell 407 to San Juan at 9am tomorrow  (Saturday) to 
install our properly overhauled  original tail rotor blades. This will only 
take 4 hours and should be back  on St. Thomas by 4pm at latest.
*Please advise if I should delay this repair.
Clint arrives JFK at 10am Saturday in case Paris trip is  a go.
LV



************************************** See what's new at http://www.aol.com
body_html:
Jeffrey,
I have Nicolas taking the Bell 407 to San Juan at 9am tomorrow (Saturday) to install our properly overhauled original tail rotor blades. This will only take 4 hours and should be back on St. Thomas by 4pm at latest.
*Please advise if I should delay this repair.
Clint arrives JFK at 10am Saturday in case Paris trip is a go.
LV
